steps.speaker: Narrator
steps.text: The talayot of Son Fornes, Mallorca. A warm afternoon under the Mediterranean sun.

steps.speaker: Balchar
steps.text: ...zzzzZZzzzz....

steps.speaker: Narrator
steps.text: Balchar, a talayotic foner, naps against the stones. Nearby, his myotragus companion Bep grazes.

steps.speaker: Bep
steps.text: **Sniff, sniff, sniff**

steps.speaker: Narrator
steps.text: Bep wanders toward an old altar, half-hidden among the rocks. Strange herbs grow around it.

steps.speaker: Bep
steps.text: *Smells herbs*

steps.speaker: Bep
steps.text: *munch, munch, munch*

steps.speaker: Dimoni
steps.text: WHO DARES DEFILE MY ALTAR?!

steps.speaker: Balchar
steps.text: ...mmm...what...let me sleep...

steps.speaker: Dimoni
steps.text: Your wretched beast has devoured my sacred herbs! These take longer than those herbs of Poseidon to grow back!

steps.speaker: Bep
steps.text: Beeeeeep

steps.speaker: Balchar
steps.text: Who on earth are you?! Are you one of those sea people?

steps.speaker: Dimoni
steps.text: SILENCE! I have inhabited this land way before your species even existed show some respect and apologize for your beast's actions!

steps.speaker: Balchar
steps.text: I mean he's a Myotragus. He eats things. That's what he does.

steps.speaker: Dimoni
steps.text: SILENCE! Your beast has now stolen a piece of my power. Give it back and accept your punishment!

steps.speaker: Balchar
steps.text: Hear me out mate! I am not sticking my hand in there! Have you ever smelled a goat?!

steps.speaker: Dimoni
steps.text: SILENCE! Show some respect. My power is beyond your comprehension. Actually...

steps.speaker: Dimoni
steps.text: HA HA HA HA HA

steps.speaker: Dimoni
steps.text: ... the power this beast stole will be your punishment. Every demon on this island will sense him now!

steps.speaker: Balchar
steps.text: Bep why can't your stay still?! You are always getting me into trouble!

steps.speaker: Bep
steps.text: Well I was hungry man what could I do?

steps.speaker: Balchar
steps.text: Wait...Bep?

steps.speaker: Bep
steps.text: What, I was hungry! You never let me try your food

steps.speaker: Balchar
steps.text: Bep why are you talking?!

steps.speaker: Bep
steps.text: What?! Wow, Why am I talking?! Oh shit!

steps.speaker: Bep
steps.text: Uff my stomach now hurts like crazy...

steps.speaker: Dimoni
steps.text: Consider it a gift. Or a side effect of my power. Either way, you will both suffer for this. Now get out of my sight!

steps.speaker: Dimoni
steps.text: See you when you are dead, don't bother me or my vassals never!

steps.speaker: Bep
steps.text: Balchar, what do we do?! He cursed us!

steps.speaker: Balchar
steps.text: Great.

steps.speaker: Balchar
steps.text: I don't know man this is all your fault, Bep.

steps.speaker: Bep
steps.text: MY fault?! You were supposed to be watching me! Also he cursed both of us!

steps.speaker: Balchar
steps.text: I was just napping.

steps.speaker: Bep
steps.text: ...So what now?

steps.speaker: Balchar
steps.text: Now I'm not napping anymore so we walk...

steps.speaker: Balchar
steps.text: ... And you stop eating things.
